rulings.Case Title: CITY AND COUNTY OF SF VS MCCOLM
rulings.Calendar Matter: DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED CROSS COMPLAINT
rulings.Rulings: Cross-Deft's (BOYAJIAN & CCSF) Demurrer to and Motion to Strike Cross-Complaint - SUSTAINED WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO indemnification; apportionment of fault; declaratory relief; conspiracy; interference with economic relationship; violation of B&P 17500; defamation; false light; right to privacy; interference with advantage UNDER GOV'T 821.6. City and its attorney are immune from liability for prosecution of action which was in the scope of their duties government code 821.6. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO discrimination/retaliation and Unruh act. NO ALLEGATION THAT CROSS-COMPLAINANT COMPLIED WITH CLAIMS ACT. SUSTAIN WITHOUT LEAVE TO AMEND AS TO CAUSE OF ACTION UNDER 42 USC 1983 BASED UPON RES JUDICATA. OVERRULE AS TO trespass; intentional infliction of emotional distress; assault; battery; false imprisonment; and breach of contract. Collateral estoppel from federal court order not applicable because of provision in federal court order at page 26 dismissing state claims without prejudice. government code 821.4 not applicable because cross-complaint alleges intentionally abusive conduct similiarly 821.8 not applicable because allegations of intentionally abusive conduct in entering property. (302/AJR/PB)
